params.name: Holmes' Pipe
params.description:
On Jan 1, 1870, Sherlock Holmes finally solved the case of the Hound of Baskerville.

When Sherlock Holmes was working on a case, the fire of his pipe always flickered. A legend in Baskerville said that the family was cursed by a fearsome hound. After a few days, Holmes finally managed to catch the murderer and found the truth behind the beast that plagued the Baskervilles for years.

[Famous Quotes]

There is nothing new under the sun. It has all been done before. We are insignificant, and work …
